## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Prompt
- [ ] Skill
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Repo maintenance

## Quality checklist

- [ ] This improves test quality, agent behavior, or project clarity.
- [ ] This avoids vague AI-generated filler.
- [ ] Examples include hidden assumptions and why the tests matter.
- [ ] Prompts require assumption extraction before test generation.
- [ ] Documentation is clear for public readers.
- [ ] Markdown has been reviewed.

## Assumption Forge alignment

Which principle does this change support?

- [ ] Risk before coverage
- [ ] Assumptions before assertions
- [ ] Behavior before implementation
- [ ] Smallest reliable test
- [ ] No fake confidence
- [ ] Explain the failure mode

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on?
